Block.Para: An Act to change the name of the electoral district of Notre-Dame-de-Gr脙垄ce 芒聙聰 Lachine

This bill was introduced during the Second Session of the 40th Parliament. Pursuant to the Standing Orders of the House of Commons, it is deemed to have been considered and approved at all stages completed at the time of prorogation of the Second Session. The number of the bill remains unchanged.

Also available on the Parliament of Canada Web Site at the following address:
http://www.parl.gc.ca
This enactment changes the name of the electoral district of Notre-Dame-de-Gr脙垄ce 芒聙聰 Lachine to 芒聙聹Notre-Dame-de-Gr脙垄ce 芒聙聰 Lachine 芒聙聰 Dorval芒聙聺.
An Act to change the name of the electoral district of Notre-Dame-de-Gr脙垄ce 芒聙聰 Lachine
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Block.MarginalNote: Name changed to 芒聙聹Notre-Dame-de-Gr脙垄ce 芒聙聰 Lachine 芒聙聰 Dorval芒聙聺
Block.Para: 1. In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of August 25, 2003, under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act, paragraph 45 of that part relating to the Province of Quebec is amended by substituting the name 芒聙聹Notre-Dame-de-Gr脙垄ce 芒聙聰 Lachine 芒聙聰 Dorval芒聙聺 for the name 芒聙聹Notre-Dame-de-Gr脙垄ce 芒聙聰 Lachine芒聙聺.

Published under authority of the Speaker of the House of Commons
